allow: PowerShell(git archive --format=zip -o "$env:USERPROFILE\\Desktop\\Odora-backup.zip" HEAD; if \($?\) { Get-Item "$env:USERPROFILE\\Desktop\\Odora-backup.zip" | Select-Object Name, @{N='SizeKB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB\)}} })

PowerShell($dest = Join-Path \([Environment]::GetFolderPath\('Desktop'\)\) \('Odora-backup-' + \(Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd_HH-mm'\) + '.zip'\); Compress-Archive -Path \(Get-ChildItem -Force | Where-Object Name -ne '.git'\).FullName -DestinationPath $dest -Force; 'Backup created: ' + $dest + ' \(' + [math]::Round\(\(Get-Item $dest\).Length/1KB\) + ' KB\)')
PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" auth login --hostname github.com --git-protocol https --web)
PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" repo create odora --public --source . --push --description "Odora - perfume recommendation web app | Discover your scent")

PowerShell($gh = "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"; for \($i = 0; $i -lt 12; $i++\) { $s = \(& $gh api repos/Majedmahdavi/odora/pages --jq .status\); "attempt $\($i+1\): $s"; if \($s -eq "built"\) { break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 10 })
